channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Corner of Lorrimore square and Fleming road, 1st May
item.description:
The electrical box door is not secure and keeps swinging open. There are bird nests inside which must effect the wiring. This is has reportedly been solved but it clearly has NOT.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins collection needed, 1st May
item.description:
The bins on the new tideway park are overflowing, please send someone for collection asap Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossfield Street, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress, Nadine Street, 1st May
item.description:
This is right under the nose of your CCTV camera in Charlton Church Lane, so you should be able to identify who did it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nadine Street, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 35 Fellows Road NW3 3DX, 1st May
item.description:
The tree appears to e deceased
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Fellows Road, Belsize Park, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on recycling bin, 1st May
item.description:
On corner of Loughborough Park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London

item.title: Denmark Hill Sae5, junction with Love Walk. Fly post affixed to CCTV column., 1st May
item.description:
Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned bike, 1st May
item.description:
Abandoned bike blocking pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Tunnel Avenue, East Greenwich, City of London

item.title: Outside no.79 Kilburn High Road corner of Brondesbury Villas, 1st May
item.description:
A clothing horse has been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Communal bins overflowing and waste strewn across gardens, 1st May
item.description:
The communal waste bins are currently overflowing and some of the refuse bags have been ripped open and their contents (including used nappies and other sanitary products) have been scattered across the gardens in front of the houses. Have spotted rats.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Magic whip cannisters in the road and on the green, 1st May
item.description:
3 days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ascot Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall in Cambria Road, 1st May
item.description:
At side of 1 Northway Road just after bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Northway Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped two seater sofa, 1st May
item.description:
Faux leather two seater sofa dumped at rear gates of one of the houses on Parish Lane. Opposite side of street from 6 Hardings Lane SE20 7JJ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hardings Lane, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 1st May
item.description:
Chest of drawers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead

item.title: Flytipping of carpet, suitcases, wood, 1st May
item.description:
Near the junction of Lannoy Road and Avery Hill Road, by the commercial bins. Flytipping of suitcases, now carpet and wood added.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not fixed, 1st May
item.description:
Not fixed
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Surplus wheelie bins, 1st May
item.description:
These two small bins were delivered in error. I have asked for them to be removed before. They are constantly getting in the way. The flats at 39-41 share two 360 black waste bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tunstall Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 1st May
item.description:
Abandoned Grey jaguar Reg 0W17 BFM in middle of road with hazards on been there since last night, police involved and tap around it, but it is blocking the road and needs moving .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leatherbottle Green, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Give way sign and Traffic lights required at this junction as it is unsafe and chaotic with the current layout and lack of traffic control., 1st May
item.description:
Give way sign and Traffic lights required at this junction as it is unsafe and chaotic with the current layout and lack of traffic control.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights are not working, 1st May
item.description:
4 street lights are not working Close to 42 Greenwich South Street. The street is very dark and unsafe

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich South Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
